query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_books,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enrichedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enriched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND coverImageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_cover,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3CoverUrl IS NOT NULL AND s3CoverUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as mirrored_to_s3,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND coverImageUrl != '' AND (s3CoverUrl IS NULL OR s3CoverUrl = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending_mirror
FROM book_profiles;

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_books,
  SUM(CASE WHEN enrichedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enriched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND coverImageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_cover,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3CoverUrl IS NOT NULL AND s3CoverUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as mirrored_to_s3,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND coverImageUrl != '' AND (s3CoverUrl IS NULL OR s3CoverUrl = '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending_mirror
FROM book_profiles;
